mapper.select: SELECT repository_id AS repositoryId, company_id AS companyId, project_id AS projectId, repository_identifier AS repositoryName, repository_url AS repositoryUrl, repository_main_yn AS mainYn, created_at AS createdAt FROM repository_setting WHERE company_id = #{companyId} AND project_id = #{projectId} ORDER BY repository_main_yn DESC, created_at DESC

SELECT repository_id AS repositoryId, company_id AS companyId, project_id AS projectId, repository_identifier AS repositoryName, repository_url AS repositoryUrl, repository_main_yn AS mainYn, created_at AS createdAt FROM repository_setting WHERE company_id = #{companyId} AND project_id = #{projectId} AND repository_id = #{repositoryId}
mapper.insert:
SELECT NVL(MAX(repository_manage_id), 0) + 1 FROM repository_manage_setting
INSERT INTO repository_manage_setting ( repository_manage_id, company_id ) VALUES ( #{repositoryManageId}, #{companyId} )

SELECT 'REPO-' || TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD') || '-' || (NVL(MAX(TO_NUMBER(SUBSTR(repository_id, -4))), 0) + 1) FROM repository_setting WHERE repository_id LIKE 'REPO-' || TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD') || '-%' AND REGEXP_LIKE(repository_id, '^REPO-[0-9]{8}-[0-9]+$')
INSERT INTO repository_setting ( repository_id, company_id, project_id, repository_manage_id, repository_identifier, repository_url, repository_main_yn, created_at ) VALUES ( #{repositoryId}, #{companyId}, #{projectId}, #{repositoryManageId}, #{repositoryName}, #{repositoryUrl}, #{mainYn}, SYSDATE )
